DAY 59/60: The Life of a Student Videographer I post all my videos in 5:4 (1350×1080), and it’s become my favorite format. I love the cinematic look of horizontal videos, but vertical performs better because it fills more of the screen. 5:4 is the perfect middle ground—it keeps the horizontal feel while taking up more space in the feed. It also lets me shoot everything horizontally without rotating my camera and simply crop in during editing. It’s the best of both worlds. Follow me, to be part of my journey  #videography #students #cinematographers #series #videographytips

We went back for more after filming… #PR #DonQuijote #JONETZ #JapanTravelSouvenirs #AkihabaraDonki Don Quijote operates over 600 stores in Japan, including more than 50 in Tokyo alone. Donki is effectively a one-stop shop. You can find discounted designer goods, skincare and makeup, electronics accessories, high-end wagyu beef, and one of the world's largest selections of cosplay supplies. Donki also offers tax-free shopping for international visitors, allowing you to easily process refunds directly in-store. Open 24 hours, it's a place to experience Japanese culture, offering everything from classic Japanese souvenirs to unique items! Get great coupons here > https://japanportal.donki-global.com/coupon/?ptcd=0000011201

On Sunday 21 June at 10:19 I was trail running near Valbonë in Albania when I was bitten by a European Nose-horned Viper. Here is a summarised snapshot of the events that followed with time stamps. I’ve been living in New Zealand the last 3.5 years so my knowledge of snakebite first aid in the moment was slightly hazy. I instantly filmed the snake for identification purposes, sat down on the trail and dialled 112 as this was the only line that I was able to call with my eSIM. Having no success with the operator and after they hung up on me, I called my dad in Australia who asked for my What3Words to give to Australian emergency services for Interpol. I then called a hostel owner in Shkodër who was able to assist by putting me in contact with local emergency authorities on WhatsApp (thank goodness for cell service) who gained my current location and dispatched an ambulance. In the meantime, I initially removed my socks and singlet to create a makeshift tourniquet higher up on the limb but realised this was incorrect action and later removed this to provide compression around the area of the bite. I had been informed to stay immobilised, despite being on a section of a trail that would be tricky to reach.  Without cell service, this could have been a completely different outcome. Please travel with an inReach or PLB if you intend to be entering areas without internet coverage. Also download an emergency locator app like What3Words and always carry an appropriate first aid kit.  #snakebite #albania #valbonë #trailrunning #solobackpacking

POV: You got to be a princess for a day in Japan. 👑✨ If you’ve ever dreamed of dressing up like royalty, this is your chance. At the Music Forest Museum in Kawaguchiko, you can rent from a huge selection of elegant dresses (they even have outfits for little princes and princesses!) and wander through a fairytale-like village filled with beautiful photo spots. If you’re lucky with the weather, you’ll even have Mt. Fuji as the backdrop! 🗻 While you’re there, don’t miss the Titanic Exhibition, now extended until December 31. It includes beautiful displays, an opera performance inspired by the film, and it’s definitely worth adding to your visit. 📍Kawaguchiko Music Forest Museum, Yamanashi ⚠️ Travel can get expensive fast, so I always take whatever discounts I can get! Feel free to use my Klook code 𝗪𝗜𝗧𝗛𝗔𝗧𝗛𝗘𝗡𝗔 when you book your hotels + transpo + other activ#kawaguchiko#kawaguchikoprincess #dress

In Part 2, we explore the timeless culture, rich traditions, and fascinating history hidden inside the streets of the Walled City. From centuries-old architecture to the stories behind Lahore's iconic gates, this journey reveals why Lahore is known as the heart of Pakistan. If you love travel, history, culture, and cinematic storytelling, this series is made for you. I thought my DJI Osmo Pocket 3 was already enough for travel… until I tried the new DJI Pocket 4P. The biggest upgrade for me is the flexibility: wide shots for places, 60mm portraits for people, better handling in tricky light, 4K slow motion for travel B-roll, and D-Log 2 if you want more room to color grade ✨ Basically, it still fits in a tiny setup, but the footage feels more polished and cinematic. For everyday clips, a phone is still convenient. But for travel shots I want to feel more intentional? This is the kind of camera I’d reach for! Won’t you agree?   ⚠️Comment “4P” for more info on the newest DJI Pocket 4P! - - - #DJIPocket4P #vlogcamera #digitalcamera #pocketcamera #camerarecommendation
